summary: Added Owlory PR hygiene and UI testing hygiene workflows, wired them into docs discovery, architecture lint, and review preflight so future agents preserve proof boundaries, clean PR claims, deterministic UI-test setup rules, and UI failure classification.

contract_status_changes.before: Review workflow required preflight and exact findings, but did not give future agents a compact PR claim shape or merge-handoff gate.
contract_status_changes.after: docs/workflows/pr-hygiene.md defines slice scope, proof level, validations, artifacts, residual risk, and clean/mirror expectations for PRs.

contract_status_changes.before: Owlory had running-app smoke and proof artifacts, but no maintained workflow explaining isolated DerivedData, deterministic seeds, screenshot proof boundaries, or UI failure classification.
contract_status_changes.after: docs/workflows/ui-testing-hygiene.md defines current UI proof lanes, future XCUITest setup rules, screenshot artifact requirements, and failure classification.

contract_status_changes.before: review-preflight did not specifically flag PR/review hygiene or UI proof/testing changes.
contract_status_changes.after: Tools/review-preflight.sh recommends PR/UI hygiene docs, running-app smoke when UI proof paths change, and risks around proof inflation, stale DerivedData, deterministic data, durable screenshots, and failure classification.

contract_status_changes.before: The new PR/UI testing hygiene behavior was not required by architecture lint.
contract_status_changes.after: Tools/architecture-lint.sh requires docs/workflows/pr-hygiene.md and docs/workflows/ui-testing-hygiene.md so they remain part of the maintained docs tree.

residual_risks: This slice does not add an Owlory XCUITest target or a batched UI regression runner.
The running-app smoke runner was not run because this slice changes docs/tooling only and does not claim app behavior.
Future UI-test implementation still needs deterministic fixture/seeding support before repeatable UI regression proof can be claimed.
recommended_next_reason: If Owlory needs repeatable UI regression coverage beyond running-app smoke and preserved screenshots, the next implementation slice should add deterministic launch seeding plus a small first XCUITest target instead of ad-hoc manual proof.
